style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration of a software factory shown as a coordinated team of distinct specialist figures working around one large shared board or screen on which a clean modern application is taking shape. The specialists read as an architect with a blueprint, a builder, a tester, a security reviewer, and a data specialist, drawn as stylized agents rather than literal people, with lines of collaboration linking them to the shared board. A sense of an entire delivery team working in concert, made of software rather than a physical assembly line. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial illustration of a software factory shown as a coordinated team of distinct specialist figures working around one large shared board or screen on which a clean modern application is taking shape. The specialists read as an architect with a blueprint, a builder, a tester, a security reviewer, and a data specialist, drawn as stylized agents rather than literal people, with lines of collaboration linking them to the shared board. A sense of an entire delivery team working in concert, made of software rather than a physical assembly line. Muted Alberta cream palette, navy and rust accents, archival print quality, no text. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
